creator: jens.holzkaemper@hu-berlin.de
text: The port is based on the github repository at https://github.com/imapsync/imapsync where currently version 2.229 can be found. That version has at least one open security issue CVE-2023-34204, which is fixed in the principal authors version 2.264 according to the changelog since about a year ago. It's possible to find that version, but the author himself doesn't provide the current stable version freely anymore, if I understand him correctly. Debian simply removed the software from their archives a couple of years ago, don't know if that's possibly the prudent position to take if upstream doesn't fix issues in a timely manner.
